description_long: This is a tall, rectangular shelving unit with a flat back and three open shelves on the front. The structure is simple and modern, with clean, straight edges and a uniform, light-colored finish. The sides are solid and unadorned, while the front features three evenly spaced horizontal shelves, each forming a compartment for storage or display. The top of the unit extends upward, possibly serving as a backing or signage area, which is common in urban environments for display or informational purposes. The overall design is utilitarian, making it suitable for use on sidewalks, in parks, or in public spaces for holding brochures, books, or small items. The material appears to be a sturdy composite or laminate, providing durability for outdoor or semi-outdoor use.
description: A tall, light-colored shelving unit with three open shelves and a flat, extended back panel. Its clean, modern design is ideal for urban public spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open shelves and the tall, flat back panel.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the shelves and the thickness of the back panel.
description_view_2: Top-down view highlighting the open compartments and the rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the solid side and shelf depth.
